meta.description: Curated external services and shareable labeled lists for Awesome Sites.

sites.name: Excalidraw
sites.description: Hand-drawn style whiteboards in the browser. Fast enough for architecture sketches and incident diagrams.

sites.name: tldraw
sites.description: Minimal infinite canvas with multiplayer. Good when you want a board without installing anything.

sites.name: draw.io
sites.description: Diagrams.net in the browser or desktop. AWS/GCP/K8s stencils when you need proper boxes and arrows.

sites.name: htop
sites.description: Interactive process viewer for Linux and macOS. The first thing to open when a box feels slow.

sites.name: DB Browser for SQLite
sites.description: Visual editor for SQLite files. Handy for local prototypes and quick data peeks.

sites.name: ngrok
sites.description: Expose a local port to the internet with a public URL. Webhooks and mobile testing without VPN gymnastics.

lists.label: Whiteboard
lists.description: Diagram and sketch tools that stay in the browser.

lists.label: Ops shelf
lists.description: Things you open when production hiccups or local dev needs a tunnel.

lists.label: Data peeks
lists.description: Lightweight ways to inspect data without standing up a warehouse.
